subcodes.first_line: That which hath been sent down aforetime from the heaven of the All-Merciful Will is this: And whoso leaveth his home as a migrant unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه از قبل از سماء مشیت رحمانیه نازل اینست و من یخرج من بیته مهاجرا الی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
